content: Run complete test suite to assess current state (oracle harness, unit tests, integration tests)
Conduct take stock assessment of progress toward R superiority
Run comprehensive code audit using zen mcp tools
Identify and implement next sprint objectives
Refactor summary statistics to eliminate code duplication between LmFit and GlmFit
Simplify and document coefficient correction logic in fit_internal
Optimize bootstrap matrix conversion to improve memory efficiency
Create configurable constants for hardcoded tolerance values
Implement GLM benchmarks to validate 5x performance target vs R
Expand oracle test suite with more complex statistical scenarios
